title: AntiElytraTarget
description: A Simple Plugin AntiElytraTarget For Your Servers. Made By Worty1
body:
# AntiElytraTarget – Modern Anti-ElytraTarget Plugin

AntiElytraTarget is a modern anti-cheat plugin for Minecraft 1.16.5+ compatible with Folia/Paper. It automatically detects and prevents Elytra target hacks and fast slot swapping.

## ✨ Features
- Multi-version support: 1.16.5 – 1.21.8
- Folia/Paper compatible: Thread-safe and auto-detection
- Fast slot swap detection: Monitors fast slot usage during Elytra flight
- Punishment system: Warning, temporary punishment, and ban
- Discord webhook: Sends notifications for warnings and punishments
- Effects: Sound, lighting, and particle effects
- Staff alerts: Notifies staff about suspicious players
- Admin commands: /aet reload, /aet status, /aet clear

## 📦 Installation
1. Copy antielytratarget-x.x.x.jar into the plugins folder
2. Start the server (config will be created automatically)
3. Customize settings in config.yml
4. Add Discord webhook link in the config

## 🎮 Main Commands
- /aet reload - Reloads the config
- /aet status <player> - Shows player status
- /aet clear <player> - Clears player data

## 🎯 Supported Versions
- Minecraft: 1.16.5 – 1.21.x
- Server: Paper, Folia (1.19+), Leaf, Spigot

## 📝 Notes
- Messages and punishment durations are configurable via config.yml
- Firework attacks with Elytra are blocked
- Warning and punishment effects can be toggled on/off
- Debug mode allows testing and logging
